segment.source: Renders an optional heading and intro text above a wrapping grid of small badges, each with its own text, optional link, and color (default, blue, green, red, yellow), in default, outline, or secondary style. Use it for: tag and keyword lists, skill or technology stacks, topic and category collections, industries served, supported integrations. Prefer 'Logo Grid' for image logos, 'Compliance Badges' for certification seals, 'Trust Badges' when each badge needs a description.
